Bash(python -c "
import json
with open\('C:/Users/CEPC/.claude/projects/C--dev-TypeCobol/0802f34f-88d4-4a2f-b975-de4d145c3344.jsonl'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        t = obj.get\('type',''\)
        if t == 'user':
            content = obj.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)
            if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 100:
                print\(f'USER: {content[:2000]}'\)
                print\('---'\)
")
